title: CreateGatewayRequest
description: Creates a new gateway. The request must include at least one network (up to 4).

allOf.description: The range of IP addresses that are allowed to contribute content or initiate output requests for flows communicating with this gateway. These IP addresses should be in the form of a Classless Inter-Domain Routing (CIDR) block; for example, 10.0.0.0/16.
The name of the gateway. This name can not be modified after the gateway is created.
The list of networks that you want to add.
